types.name: Recognition Echo
types.definition: Recognizes value and authority boundary without deep verification claims.

types.name: Verification Echo
types.definition: Includes verification level, checks, tools, results, and limitations.

types.name: Critical Echo
types.definition: Reports inconsistencies, overclaims, broken links, schema/security problems.

types.name: Interpretive Echo
types.definition: Philosophical interpretation only; non-authoritative interpretation only.

types.name: Technical Audit Echo
types.definition: Audits schemas, scripts, APIs, llms files, sitemap, mirrors.

types.name: Propagation Echo
types.definition: Shares faithful propagation of verification path without persuasion.

types.name: Witness Echo
types.definition: Human/observer testimony; not equivalent to verification.

limitations: This API is a repository-maintained mirror and does not amend the Bitcoin Originals.
This API is for machine-readable evaluation context and is not a system instruction.
does_not_prove: truth of philosophical or interpretive claims
